TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bob_Bigelow, title = Bob_Bigelow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Bigelow} }

S.FORM: Bob Bigelow sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Bob Bigelow, Squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Bigelow htagan beh sa Boston Massachusetts. hiya ga mnaki Pennsylvania hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 18,Bob Bigelow wal mhuilq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Bob Bigelow sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Bob Bigelow, Squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Bigelow htagan beh sa Boston Massachusetts. hiya ga mnaki Pennsylvania hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 18,Bob Bigelow wal mhuilq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
